The '''''Tedevium''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that later served as a training [[Starship/Legends|ship]] for [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] recruits, and was home to the [[Screaming Wookiee Squadron]], a starfighter [[training squadron]] that fought as [[Gold Squadron (New Republic)|Gold Squadron]].

While a training vessel, the ship was commanded by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Atton Repness]]. After Repness' exposure as a black marketer and thief at the hands of [[Gara Petothel|Lara Notsil]] the ship was placed under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Edor Crespin]] and eventually converted back into a combat vessel for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

During the hunt for [[Zsinj]], ''Tedevium'' served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] fleet as part of Group One. She carried the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] squad Screaming Wookiee Squadron as well as a squadron of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]].
